In this image, I can see two people riding bicycles on a quiet city street. The person on the left seems to be a woman wearing light-colored clothing, while the person on the right, who appears to be a man, is wearing a blue shirt and darker pants. They’re both cycling in the same direction, heading down the road. 

The buildings in the background have a simple, urban design with beige and brown tones. There’s a green awning on one of the shops, and it looks like the storefront is currently closed, as the shutters are down. There’s also a red "Do Not Enter" sign in the middle of the image, which suggests that part of the road might be restricted for certain vehicles or traffic.

The street itself looks clean and calm, and there aren’t many people or cars around, which gives the impression that this could be either a residential or less busy area of the city. Overall, it feels like a peaceful day, and the two individuals seem to be enjoying their bike ride.
